product: Salesforce Data Cloud File Sharing connector GA
tagline: The Salesforce Data Cloud File Sharing connector is now generally available.
what_it_does: The Salesforce Data Cloud File Sharing connector is now generally available. This page describes how to read data in Salesforce Data 360 (formerly Data Cloud) using the file sharing connector. Which Salesforce connector should I use?
why_it_matters: It offers improved performance for reading files from multiple data sources and better pushdown capabilities.
key_takeaway: The Salesforce Data Cloud File Sharing connector is now generally available.
